panel.title: About this section
panel.collapsed_hint: Help is hidden. Click the header to open it.

k_factor.title: K-factor
k_factor.body: Rating sensitivity coefficient. Higher means a single match changes Elo more. Newcomers start at K=60 and K decreases with experience.

super_tiebreak.title: Super-tiebreak
super_tiebreak.body: Tiebreak to 10 points (win by 2). Often played instead of a third set — saves 30+ minutes.

no_ad.title: No-ad
no_ad.body: At 40-40, one decisive point is played (no advantage). The receiver picks the side. Amateur-league classic.

snake_seeding.title: Snake seeding
snake_seeding.body: Group seeding: group 1 gets #1, group 2 gets #2... then snakes back. Distributes strength evenly.

comped.title: Comped
comped.body: Lesson given for free (promo, comp, friend). Unlike “unpaid” — this is intentional, not a debt.

walkover.title: Walkover (WO)
walkover.body: Match awarded without play, when an opponent doesn't show / withdraws before the match.

rrule.title: RRULE
rrule.body: iCal standard for recurring events. Example: “every Tue/Thu at 6 PM for 8 weeks”.
